column1: # Tone/register markers for the window-tone meter (crates/abbrev-core/src/tone.rs).
# Format: word_or_lemma<TAB>sign, sign a float in [-1, 1] (or bare +/- for ±1).
# Positive = polite/formal, negative = crude/slangy. Keys are normalized, so any
# spelling/case matches. A deliberately small seed — the meter re-reads the file,
# so expand per product/locale without code changes.
# The tone meter reads *only* the committed-word stream (no chat-id, no new
# permission; see §5.1). Register drives the masking gate (§5.2) and, later, a
